completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4)
Found 4 existing docs (audit.md, brand-strategy.md, copy.md, seo-strategy.md)
Tech stack: Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS 4
Deep scan: 40+ source files read, no API endpoints, no data models, no external state management, 31 UI components inventoried, 6-layer animation system documented
Source tree documented with 6 critical directories
Development guide written: prerequisites, commands, conventions, SEO patterns
Architecture document written: component-based SSG, 6-layer animation system, SEO implementation
Supporting docs written: project-overview.md, component-inventory.md, development-guide.md
Master index generated with all links

findings.technology_stack: Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, TypeScript 5, Tailwind CSS v4
findings.data: All static/hardcoded, single shared module lib/categories.ts
findings.animations: 6-layer custom system (CSS keyframes, IntersectionObserver reveal, scroll parallax, Tinder swipe, SVG interactive, CSS utilities)
findings.seo: Full Next.js Metadata API, 3 JSON-LD schemas, sitemap, robots
findings.issues: 10 bugs/issues identified (2 high, 4 medium, 4 low priority)
